description: Design a two-part enclosure consisting of a Box and a Lid in FreeCAD. The Box must have outer dimensions of 60x40x30 mm with a uniform 2 mm wall thickness and an open top. The Lid must feature a 60x40x4 mm main plate and a 56x36x3 mm rectangular alignment lip on the bottom face designed to fit inside the box opening. The document must contain exactly two separate Part Design Bodies named 'Box' and 'Lid'. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/project_box_assembly.FCStd.
